title: SQL Query to Retrieve Specific Rows
scenario: Generate a SQL query to retrieve all employees who work in the Sales department and have a job title that starts with 'Marketing'. The query should return the employee ID, name, email, and job title.
constraints: Must use the WHERE clause to filter the results
Must use the IN operator to check the department
Must use the REGEXP operator to check the job title

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the generated SQL query retrieves the correct rows based on the specified conditions.
Check if the generated SQL syntax is valid and follows the standard SQL syntax rules.
Evaluates how clear and easy to read the generated SQL query is.
